_schema.note: Per map -> per site -> per side -> per player: operators in preference order (ideal first). App shows [0] as ideal, [1]/[2] as alternates. Bans: pick first operator not in bans[]. Every list is the player's full 5-op pool ordered for that site.
_schema.rule_tamiym_defense: General order Thorn > Clash > Lesion > Kapkan > Ela. Clash ideal on big open sites, Thorn ideal on tighter trap sites; Ela occasional.
_schema.rule_eman_kaid: Kaid is Eman's pick ONLY where a hatch above the site can be reinforced (basements + floors with a reinforceable floor above). On the top floor, hatches above can't be reinforced so Kaid is wasted -> Eman anchors Tachanka (Mute if the threat is a wall breach); Kaid drops last.

Clubhouse._traits: Hatch-heavy, flank-rich, destructible, vertical. Bandit-trick map. 2F sites are top floor (no reinforceable hatch above) so Eman anchors Tachanka there per rule_eman_kaid.

Oregon._traits: Basement + hatches, flank-heavy, vertical. Kaid on the basement/lower hatches; 2F Kids/Master is top floor so Eman anchors Tachanka. Nomad/Gridlock flank denial; Ram/Fuze open from above.

Bank._traits: Basement + hatch-heavy, high-intel, roam-heavy but held slow. Kaid on basement + 1F hatches; 2F CEO is top floor so Eman anchors Tachanka. Fuze shines in the tight 2F CEO/conference rooms.

Chalet._traits: Basement garage-hatch + kitchen-drop (Kaid country low), big open bar, flank-heavy. 2F Master is top floor -> Eman Tachanka, Stef leans Castle (poor cam spots up top).

Coastline._traits: No basement, 2 floors, glassy + very destructible, hatch-rich, roam/flank map. Mira's best map (glass everywhere). Eman off Kaid on most sites (few reinforceable hatches) -> Mute/Tachanka.

Border._traits: 2 floors, no basement, very open + destructible, 5 hatches, tight server-room corridors, roof/balcony rappel. 2F Armory is top floor -> Eman Tachanka; 1F sites keep Kaid (hatches above).

Consulate._traits: B/1F/2F, windows everywhere, very destructible, roam-heavy. Openness inferred - tune from play.

Kafe._traits: 1F/2F/3F, vertical, terraces, soft destruction, roof hatches. 2F keeps Kaid (3F above); only 3F is top floor.

Lair._traits: B/1F/2F, underground high-tech complex, tight. Openness inferred - tune from play.

Nighthaven Labs._traits: B/1F/2F, high-tech, multi-angle holds. Openness inferred - tune from play.

Outback._traits: 1F/2F, no basement. Both 2F sites are top floor (Eman Tachanka). Openness inferred.

Emerald Plains._traits: 1F/2F, big open + exposed, soft walls. Both 2F sites top floor. Openness inferred.

Fortress._traits: 1F/2F riad, no basement, rooftops. Both 2F sites top floor (Eman Tachanka). REWORKED - openness inferred.

Calypso._traits: B/1F/2F casino, vertical, drone vents, vault basement. BRAND NEW - openness is a guess, review this one.
